name: zinput_is_force_feedback_enabled
description: zInputDI::IsForceFeedbackEnabled returns true only when the joystick option and DirectInput force-feedback capability are both non-zero.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zInput_DI_IsForceFeedbackEnabled at 0x42fa80 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 27 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the joystick-option and force-feedback capability combinations used by the gate.
